notes: Evaluation is advisory-only and does not block pipeline execution.

scope_lock.policy: No new features or refactors while PO-2 gate is failing.

district_accuracy.justification: Wrong district assignment invalidates downstream feasibility calculations.

fallback_usage_rate.justification: Fallback-derived rules mask representation regressions in real datasets.

parcel_usability_rate.justification: Production benchmark parcels must be layout-usable, not merely zoning-resolvable.

pipeline_success_rate.justification: PO-2 requires majority end-to-end success before unlocking downstream work.

rule_completeness_rate.justification: Layout-safe zoning fields must be present for nearly all production cases.

stub_zoning_rate.justification: Production progress cannot be measured against stub zoning outputs.

synthetic_dataset_rate.justification: Synthetic datasets are fixture-only and must not influence production signal.

zoning_success_rate.justification: Zoning lookup must be highly reliable to avoid cascading false negatives.
